response.justification: Bogdan is a technically strong full-stack engineer with 19+ years of experience and proven expertise in high-scale distributed systems, including work with microservices handling millions of requests per second. His current role at re:cinq involves AI-agent infrastructure development, which is directionally relevant. However, he lacks the critical hard requirements: no demonstrated track record scaling engineering teams from 10–30+ people (essential for a CTO), only superficial fintech infrastructure experience (15 months at RIDE Capital), and no clear evidence of deploying production multi-agent AI systems—his current AI work appears infrastructure-focused rather than end-to-end agentic system ownership.
strengths: 19+ years engineering experience including architecture of high-performance systems handling millions of requests/second at Dunnhumby
Currently embedded in agentic AI infrastructure work at re:cinq with hands-on exposure to MCP frameworks and AI-agent tooling
Demonstrated ability to architect across diverse technical stacks (backend, frontend, embedded, real-time systems) with strong systems fundamentals
concerns: No evidence of scaling engineering teams from 10–30+ people or developing internal technical leadership—critical gap for executive CTO role
AI experience appears limited to infrastructure and tooling; no demonstrated ownership of production multi-agent systems or LLM evaluation/fine-tuning methodology
Minimal fintech-infrastructure background (15 months at RIDE); lacks credit systems, payment flows, regulatory, and compliance domain knowledge
